raw.advertiser_name: 777Real(777リアル) パチンコ･パチスロアプリ
raw.message: 最新機種が無料で遊べる！

hook.summary: Dramatic anime character close-up on a pachinko machine screen.
hook.visual_action: Zooming out from a high-intensity anime scene to reveal a smartphone running a pachinko simulator.
hook.voiceover_transcript: もう引けねぇんだよ! スリーセブンリアルに

scene_flow: Dramatic anime close-up on a pachinko machine screen with high-energy voiceover.
Zoom out to reveal the 777 Real app on a smartphone featuring the Tokyo Revengers machine.
Rapid montage of high-intensity gameplay effects and dramatic text overlays.
Showcase of multiple popular pachinko and pachislot titles available for free in the app.
Final call to action screen with the app logo and a search bar instruction.
on_screen_text: 777 Real スリーセブンリアル
e東京リベンジャーズが遊べる!
100機種以上のパチンコ・パチスロが無料で遊べる!
audience_proxy: Japanese male fans of Tokyo Revengers and pachinko enthusiasts looking for a high-quality mobile simulator.
